parsed.production_notes: The video is a continuous, unedited shot of a real aquarium. The movement of the fish, the water currents affecting the plants, and the natural lighting on the rocks indicate it is a live-action recording.

scenes.setting: An underwater aquarium scene. Dark, textured rocks form the background. The foreground features sandy patches, smaller rocks covered in green algae, and a few green aquatic plants. The water is deep blue, illuminated from above.

panels.panel_visual_description: An underwater aquarium scene. The background consists of large, dark, textured rocks. In the foreground, there are sandy patches on the bottom, interspersed with smaller rocks covered in patches of green algae. A few thin, green aquatic plants are visible, swaying slightly in the water. The water itself is a deep, vibrant blue, illuminated by a light source from above, creating a serene atmosphere. Several small, slender fish with iridescent blue and red stripes are swimming freely throughout the tank.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous, single-shot video of an aquarium. The scene features dark rocks, a sandy bottom, green plants, and several small, colorful fish swimming. Text overlays appear throughout the video, first in Italian, then in English, scrolling upwards to explain the benefits of reading to improve English skills.
scenes.on_screen_text:
MIGLIORA IL TUO INGLESE LEGGENDO LIBRI PER 10 MINUTI AL GIORNO (Improve your English by reading books for 10 minutes a day)
3
2
1
Andiamo! (Let's go!)
Reading is one of the easiest ways to begin — and with EWA, it becomes even more powerful.
Studies show that people who read in English for just 10-15 minutes a day improve their vocabulary much faster than those who don't.
Why does it work so well? Because reading gives you real English — natural phrases, real contexts, and words you'll actually use.
With EWA, everything becomes even simpler: You get interactive bilingual books with instant translation, so you understand every sentence without stopping.
You can choose stories you love — classics, bestsellers, business books, fantasy, romance, mystery, self-development, and more.
And if you want to switch your format, you can move to audiobooks, movie scenes, or practice speaking with our AI Tutor.
Just 10-15 minutes a day is enough to see real progress. Little by little, EWA helps you start thinking in English, not just studying it.
